settings.text: Everything you need to know about shipping, returns, sizing, and caring for your jewelry.

settings.custom_liquid:
Shipping

Free standard shipping on all orders over $200.

Orders are processed within 1–3 business days. Standard delivery takes 5–10 business days within the US.

International shipping is available. Delivery times vary by destination.

Returns & Exchanges

We accept returns within 30 days of delivery.

Items must be unworn, undamaged, and in their original packaging. Contact us to initiate a return.

Exchanges are available for different sizes of the same piece, subject to availability.

Payment Methods

We accept major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover.

Express checkout options may include Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or PayPal depending on your device and browser.

All transactions are processed securely in USD.

Size Guide

Our bracelets are available in three circumference sizes:

  • Small: 14.5 cm (approx. 5.7 inches)
  • Medium: 15 cm (approx. 5.9 inches)
  • Large: 16 cm (approx. 6.3 inches)

To find your size, wrap a flexible measuring tape or string around your wrist, then add 1–1.5 cm for a comfortable fit.

Care Guide

To keep your bracelet looking its best:

  • Avoid contact with perfume, lotions, chemicals, and water
  • Remove before swimming, showering, or exercising
  • Store in a cool, dry place — use the pouch provided
  • Gently wipe with a soft, dry cloth after wearing

Natural stones and pearls may develop a subtle patina over time. This is normal and part of their natural character.

FAQs

Are the stones real?
Yes. All our gemstones and pearls are 100% natural. We do not use synthetic or lab-created materials.

Why does my bracelet look different from the photo?
Because every stone and pearl is unique, there will always be natural variation in color, shape, and pattern. This is a feature of genuine natural materials.

Can I get a custom size?
Please contact us and we'll do our best to accommodate your request.

Do you offer gift wrapping?
Every order arrives in our signature packaging, ready to gift.
